question: What are the years of birth of the authors of the top 5 best-selling books?
answer_open_ended:
answer:
J.K. Rowling - 1965; Stephen King - 1947; Dan Brown - 1965; James Patterson - 1947; John Grisham - 1955

question: Who are the Nobel Prize winners in Physics from the year 2010 to 2015? Provide a brief description of their contributions.
answer_open_ended:
answer:
2010 - Andre Geim and Konstantin Novoselov for isolating graphene; 2011 - Saul Perlmutter, Brian P. Schmidt, and Adam G. Riess for discovering the accelerated expansion of the universe; 2012 - Serge Haroche and David J. Wineland for quantum non-demolition measurements; 2013 - François Englert and Peter W. Higgs for the Higgs boson mechanism; 2014 - Isamu Akasaki, Hiroshi Amano, and Shuji Nakamura for blue LEDs; 2015 - Takaaki Kajita and Arthur B. McDonald for neutrino oscillations
answer_regime: 2010: Andre Geim, Konstantin Novoselov (Discovery of graphene); 2011: Saul Perlmutter, Brian P. Schmidt, Adam G. Riess (Observation of the accelerated expansion of the universe); 2012: Serge Haroche, David J. Wineland (Experiments with quantum entanglement and measurement); 2013: Francois Englert, Peter W. Higgs (Higgs mechanism and the prediction of the Higgs boson); 2014: Isamu Akasaki, Hiroshi Amano, Shuji Nakamura (Development of blue light-emitting diodes (LEDs)); 2015: Takaaki Kajita, Arthur B. McDonald (Discovery of neutrino oscillations)
final_answer:
answer:
2010 - Andre Geim and Konstantin Novoselov for isolating graphene; 2011 - Saul Perlmutter, Brian P. Schmidt, and Adam G. Riess for discovering the accelerated expansion of the universe; 2012 - Serge Haroche and David J. Wineland for quantum non-demolition measurements; 2013 - François Englert and Peter W. Higgs for the Higgs boson mechanism; 2014 - Isamu Akasaki, Hiroshi Amano, and Shuji Nakamura for blue LEDs; 2015 - Takaaki Kajita and Arthur B. McDonald for neutrino oscillations

question: What are the life expectancies at birth in years for the top five countries with the largest land area?
answer_open_ended:
answer:
Russia - 73.2 years; Canada - 82.2 years; United States - 76.4 years; China - 77.3 years; Australia - 83.7 years
answer_regime: Russia: 69.2, Canada: 82.3, China: 76.2, United States: 76.2, Australia: 83.2

question: Identify the host cities of the Summer Olympic Games from 2000 to 2020 and name the main stadiums used in each of these Olympics.
answer_open_ended:
answer:
Athens (2004) - Olympic Stadium; Sydney (2000) - Stadium Australia; Beijing (2008) - National Stadium; London (2012) - Olympic Stadium; Rio de Janeiro (2016) - Maracanã; Tokyo (2020) - New National Stadium
answer_regime: Sydney (Sydney Olympic Park Stadium), Athens (Athens Olympic Stadium), Beijing (National Stadium (Bird's Nest)), London (Olympic Stadium), Rio de Janeiro (Maracanã Stadium), Tokyo (New National Stadium)
final_answer:
answer:
Athens (2004) - Olympic Stadium; Sydney (2000) - Stadium Australia; Beijing (2008) - National Stadium; London (2012) - Olympic Stadium; Rio de Janeiro (2016) - Maracanã; Tokyo (2020) - New National Stadium
